modules.sql: SELECT oe.customer_id, COALESCE(cl.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(cl.last_name, '') AS last_name, oe.overdraft_count, oe.total_overdraft_amount, oe.ifw_effective_date FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count, SUM(overdraft_amount) AS total_overdraft_amount, (SELECT MIN(ifw_effective_date) FROM overdraft_events) AS ifw_effective_date FROM overdraft_events GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) oe LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, first_name, last_name FROM customers WHERE rowid IN (SELECT MAX(rowid) FROM customers GROUP BY id)) cl ON oe.customer_id = cl.id
